title: thevetia thevetioides
intro: Thevetia thevetioides, also known as Yellow Card, is a plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family. Thevetia thevetioides is a small tree or shrub native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, and its medicinal properties are attributed to the presence of thevetin and other bioactive compounds. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its anti-inflammatory, anti-diarrheal, and antiseptic properties, which have been found to provide several health benefits, including the treatment of fever, wounds, and digestive issues. The herbal preparations of Thevetia thevetioides include extracts, tinctures, and infusions, which are used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
